calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-03-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
EDWARD SINGER, JR., Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Trophy Properties IV DE LLC
JASON WOLFORD, Esq. on behalf of defendant Sherry Andrews

The parties settled this matter after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement were as follows: The parties stipulated to entry of judgment. Plaintiff to pay defendant the sum of $7,000.00. Plaintiff to pay additional $7,000.00 upon vacating of the premises located at 755 Green St., #1A., S.F., CA. Defendant to vacate premises within 45 days of this date.

Judge Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: Vera Mu/JIRoque; Reporter: Rita Howell #2542 (206)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
